title: Frozen blueberries recalled in several states under FDA’s highest risk level
author: Jeremy Tanner
fullText: An Oregon-based company is recalling nearly 60,000 pounds of frozen blueberries that may be contaminated with Listeria monocytogenes.
summary: An Oregon-based company is recalling nearly 60,000 pounds of frozen blueberries that may be contaminated with Listeria monocytogenes.
